summary: Recent updates in the Camera & audio capture area of Firefox primarily focus on enhancing the logging capabilities for better diagnostics and testing. The introduction of **gtest (Google Test)** will improve the reliability of unit tests, making it easier for developers to ensure that camera and audio features function correctly. Additionally, utilizing **MOZ_LOG_FMT** in system services will streamline how logs are formatted, providing clearer insights into camera and audio performance issues. These changes are crucial for maintaining high standards of functionality and user experience in media capture, ensuring that features like video calls and live streaming work smoothly and efficiently.
